title: DIRECTION SERVICE COUNSELING CENTER - 211info
text: DIRECTION SERVICE COUNSELING CENTER DIRECTION SERVICE COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services. Services include assessment, diagnosis, and counseling for individuals experiencing mental and emotional disorders. Same day assessments available. Specialty areas include mood disorders including depression, anxiety disorders, trauma, childhood behavioral issues, and other areas of concern. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Walk in: Monday noon-4pm and Tuesday 9am-1pm (OHP members only) Email (541) 344-7303 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 344-7303 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment or walk in for same day assessment FEES: Accepts OHP, private pay, and private insurance DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of 6th street and Olive street Downtown Eugene. 3RD Floor of the Heron Building. Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Health/Disability Related Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
